name: Platformer Core
summary: A playable side-view platform game loop with player movement, platforms, coins, score, hazards, and a fail rule.
llm1Card: A complete platformer game core: move, jump, collect coins, avoid hazards, and score.

basic.description: Small playable platformer suitable as a first generated version.

mobile.description: Platformer core prepared for mobile controls supplied by the Intent component bridge.

dsl: create object name=Player type=ShapePainter shape=rectangle color=#4488FF width=32 height=48 scene={{scene}}
create object name=Ground type=ShapePainter shape=rectangle color=#8B4513 width=800 height=20 scene={{scene}}
create object name=Platform type=ShapePainter shape=rectangle color=#8B4513 width=100 height=16 scene={{scene}}
create object name=Coin type=ShapePainter shape=circle color=#FFD700 width=16 height=16 scene={{scene}}
create object name=Enemy type=ShapePainter shape=rectangle color=#DC3232 width=32 height=32 scene={{scene}}
set variable name=Score value=0 type=Number scope=global
place object=Ground at=400,590 scene={{scene}} width=800 height=20
place object=Platform at=200,460 scene={{scene}} width=100 height=16
place object=Platform at=400,380 scene={{scene}} width=100 height=16
place object=Platform at=600,300 scene={{scene}} width=100 height=16
on collision Player Coin -> destroy Coin, score+1 scene={{scene}}
on key Space -> jump Player 500 scene={{scene}}

capabilities.name: Platform movement
capabilities.summary: Add platformer movement and jumping to a player object.
capabilities.llm1Hint: The player can move and jump through platform-style levels.

constraints.playerPlacement: Place the player near the lower-left area for platform games.
constraints.platforms: Pair with shape objects for ground and platforms.

capabilities.name: Collectible scoring
capabilities.summary: Collect objects, destroy the collected item, and update a score variable.
capabilities.llm1Hint: Players can collect items such as coins or gems for score.

commands: set variable name=Score value=<InitialValue> type=Number scope=global
examples: set variable name=Score value=0 type=Number scope=global
on collision Player Coin -> destroy Coin, score+1

constraints.scoreVariable: Use Score as the default global score variable.
constraints.pickupAction: A collectible collision should remove the collected object or otherwise mark it as consumed.

capabilities.name: Enemy collision hazard
capabilities.summary: Create enemies or hazards that punish the player on collision.
capabilities.llm1Hint: Enemies and hazards can reset, defeat, or otherwise punish the player.

constraints.feedback: For the current runtime slice, restart is the safest default punishment.
constraints.placement: Place enemies away from the initial player spawn unless the user asks for high difficulty.

capabilities.name: Shape objects and text
capabilities.summary: Create visible game objects using ShapePainter rectangles/circles and Text objects.
capabilities.llm1Hint: Visuals use simple colored shapes and text, enough for players, enemies, platforms, coins, bullets, and HUD labels.

commands: create object name=<Name> type=ShapePainter shape=rectangle|circle color=#RRGGBB width=<Width> height=<Height> scene=<SceneName>
create object name=<Name> type=Text scene=<SceneName> size=<Size>
set object name=<Name> color=#RRGGBB width=<Width> height=<Height> shape=rectangle|circle scene=<SceneName>
place object=<Name> at=<X>,<Y> scene=<SceneName> width=<Width> height=<Height>
set placement object=<Name> x=<X> y=<Y> scene=<SceneName>
examples: create object name=Player type=ShapePainter shape=rectangle color=#4488FF width=32 height=48 scene=Game
create object name=ScoreText type=Text scene=Game size=24

constraints.objectNames: Use stable English names. Do not rename objects unless explicitly requested.
constraints.shapePainter: ShapePainter objects must include shape, color, width, and height.

capabilities.name: Base scene
capabilities.summary: Create the playable scene and base canvas for a GameCastle project.
capabilities.llm1Hint: A game can have one main playable scene on an 800x600 canvas.

constraints.sceneName: Use Game unless the user explicitly asks for another scene.

capabilities.name: Simple timed spawn
capabilities.summary: Spawn objects on a timer or in response to input.
capabilities.llm1Hint: The game can add simple timed spawns, such as falling hazards or recurring enemies.

examples: on key Space -> spawn Bullet at 420,500

constraints.spawnPosition: Use numeric coordinates. Keep spawns inside or just outside the 800x600 play area.
constraints.currentLimit: The current runtime slice does not yet include full projectile physics.
